notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an open battle scene where three brothers (刘文武, 欧阳碧桑, 墨狮狂) merge into a three-headed-six-armed monster, kill and then have their victims revived by 太白云生 using 人如故 gu. 方源 observes and suppresses his battle intent. All events are publicly visible combat actions. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present in the seed. The entities' internal thoughts, hidden agendas, or non-public information are not provided in the source excerpts. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculation or restating ordinary visible events.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows the three brothers (刘文武, 欧阳碧桑, 墨狮狂) merging into a three-headed-six-armed monster that kills people. Fang Yuan observes and feels battle intent but suppresses it. The observed actions are clear (killing, reviving, attacking), but motives are ambiguous - we see the monster killing but not why the brothers transformed or what they want. No direct source support for any specific inferred motive. Only behavior is visible; motive is ambiguous.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed describes three brothers (刘文武, 欧阳碧桑, 墨狮狂) who merge into a monster via a combined killer move, but they are not identified as belonging to any named faction, clan, family, or organization. The entity '刘家一位蛊师强者' (a Gu master expert from the Liu family) appears in sourcePointer ptr_17, suggesting a '刘家' (Liu family/clan) exists, but this is only a single pointer reference with no entity or relation defining the Liu family as a collective actor with stakes. The seed primarily focuses on individual combatants (the three brothers as individuals, Fang Yuan, Tai Bai Yun Sheng, Hei Lou Lan) and individual deaths/revivals. No named collective faction/group with a concrete stake in the seed facts is sufficiently established.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
